nodes.label: AI as creative catalyst for brainstorming
nodes.label_negative: AI as creative driver that replaces human artistry

nodes.label: AI for technical and workflow tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for creative composition and songwriting
nodes.grounding_span: I'm much more interested in it helping with technical tasks

nodes.label: Human creative control and final judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I like to keep control of that, for sure

nodes.label: AI as idea generator without creative ownership
nodes.grounding_span: I just want it to throw lots of ideas at the wall

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and human artistry
nodes.grounding_span: Writing the rhythms and melodies by hand is the crucial human element

nodes.label: Efficiency and reduced procrastination
nodes.grounding_span: I probably spend less time brainstorming or procrastinating

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AI for brainstorming and technical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'm using it mostly for brainstorming out of creative blocks

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI in creative composition
Concern about AI-generated music flooding the market
nodes.grounding_span: Spotify has already flooded their editorial playlists with 'fake' artist profiles

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through feedback loops
nodes.grounding_span: I'll just tell it its being cheesy for this or that reason and eventually we get there
